mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_cafe_kiosk_2603.point_history (point_id, order_id, type, amount, balance_after) VALUES (#{pointId}, #{orderId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter})
mapper.select: SELECT id, point_id, order_id, type, amount, balance_after, created_at FROM board_cafe_kiosk_2603.point_history WHERE point_id = #{pointId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
